option.value: /API-Documentatie (snapshot).md

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# API-Documentatie — VoiceTally JSON upload, UI → Room → JSON mappings
Doel: beschrijf de JSON-upload routes, alle gebruikersinvoervelden (MetadataScherm, TellingScherm, AnnotatieScherm), de Room-tabellen en maak een verbindende grid die UI veld → Room kolom → JSON veld koppelt. Rechts staan drie lege kolommen voor jouw notities.
Checklist - [x] Endpoint(s) en auth omschrijven - [x] UI-velden inventariseren (Metadata, Telling, Annotatie) - [x] Room-entiteiten en kolommen opnemen (types, PK/FK, indices) - [x] Grid (rijen) die UI widget → form variable → Room kolom → JSON DTO veld linkt - [x] Bestandsreferenties (absolute path + relevante regels)
Belangrijke endpoints
- POST /api/counts_save?language={lang}&versie={versie} - Body: JSON array met precies 1 ServerTellingEnvelope - Auth: HTTP Basic (username/password) - Code: `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\net\TrektellenApi.kt` (postCountsSave, lijnen ~39-81)
- POST /api/data_save/{onlineId} - Body: JSON array met precies 1 ServerTellingDataItem (per-record upload) - Auth: HTTP Basic - Code: `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\net\TrektellenApi.kt` (postDataSaveSingle, lijnen ~90-126)
Opmerking: beide DTOs gebruiken alleen strings voor velden — zie `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\net\Types.kt`.
Room-schema (samenvatting)
- Entity: `telling_headers` (file: `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\core\database\entities\TellingHeader.kt`) - Primary key: `tellingid` (String) - Fields (String): onlineid, externid, timezoneid, bron, telpostid, begintijd, eindtijd, tellers, weer, windrichting, windkracht, temperatuur, bewolking, bewolkinghoogte, neerslag, duurneerslag, zicht, tellersactief, tellersaanwezig, typetelling, metersnet, geluid, opmerkingen, hydro, hpa, equipment, uuid, uploadtijdstip, nrec, nsoort, status - Indices: windrichting, begintijd
- Entity: `waarnemingen` (file: `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\core\database\entities\Waarneming.kt`) - Primary key: composite `(idLocal, tellingid)` (Strings) - Foreign key: tellingid -> telling_headers.tellingid (ON DELETE CASCADE) - Fields (String): soortid, aantal, richting, aantalterug, richtingterug, sightingdirection, lokaal, aantal_plus, aantalterug_plus, lokaal_plus, markeren, markerenlokaal, geslacht, leeftijd, kleed, opmerkingen, trektype, teltype, location, height, tijdstip, groupid, uploadtijdstip, totaalaantal - Indices: tellingid, soortid
- Entity: `sync_logs` (file: `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\core\database\entities\SyncLog.kt`) - Fields: id (auto), tellingid, onlineid, timestamp, requestPayload, serverResponse, success
Room-tabel veld-instellingen (detail)
Hieronder staan per Room-tabel de exacte veldinstellingen (SQL-type, Kotlin-type, default value, PK/FK, indices, beschrijving en code reference). Alle velden in de twee hoofd-entities zijn Kotlin non-nullable Strings en worden in Room als TEXT opgeslagen.

Netwerk DTOs (server JSON) - `ServerTellingEnvelope` (see `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\net\Types.kt`, lijnen 8-43) - Velden (String): externid, timezoneid, bron, _id (idLocal), tellingid, telpostid, begintijd, eindtijd, tellers, weer, windrichting, windkracht, temperatuur, bewolking, bewolkinghoogte, neerslag, duurneerslag, zicht, tellersactief, tellersaanwezig, typetelling, metersnet, geluid, opmerkingen, onlineid, HYDRO, hpa, equipment, uuid, uploadtijdstip, nrec, nsoort, data (array ServerTellingDataItem)
- `ServerTellingDataItem` (zie `Types.kt`, lijnen 45-73) - Velden (String): _id (idLocal), tellingid, soortid, aantal, richting, aantalterug, richtingterug, sightingdirection, lokaal, aantal_plus, aantalterug_plus, lokaal_plus, markeren, markerenlokaal, geslacht, leeftijd, kleed, opmerkingen, trektype, teltype, location, height, tijdstip, groupid, uploadtijdstip, totaalaantal
Mapping grid (UI → Form/VM → Room → JSON)
Kolommen: - Screen: welke UI - Widget ID / Label: widget id(s) - UI input type: tekst / dropdown / checkbox / number / toggle - Form / VM property: variabele of helper-functie die waarde leest - Room table: telling_headers / waarnemingen - Room column: exacte kolomnaam - JSON DTO field: ServerTellingEnvelope / ServerTellingDataItem veldnaam - Code reference: file + relevante regels - Voorbeeld waarde - Note1 | Note2 | Note3 (leeg voor jouw aantekeningen)

`Waarneming.kt` (50); `Types.kt` (69) | `1657084823` | | | | | TellingAnnotationHandler | `uploadtijdstip` | timestamp string formatted `yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss` | `ServerTellingDataItem.uploadtijdstip` | `waarnemingen` | `uploadtijdstip` | `uploadtijdstip` | `TellingAnnotationHandler.kt` (292-295, 293-294); `Waarneming.kt` (52); `Types.kt` (71) | `2026-07-06 09:12:05` | | | |
Additional notes & mappings
- Room → Server mapping functions: `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\core\database\RoomMappers.kt` contains `TellingHeader.toServerEnvelope(records)` and `Waarneming.toServerItem()` that map Room entity fields to `ServerTellingEnvelope` and `ServerTellingDataItem` fields respectively (see file lines ~1-79).
- Upload lifecycle (where mappings are used): - Start telling: `StartTellingApi.buildEnvelopeFromUi(...)` builds initial `ServerTellingEnvelope` from Metadata UI and is uploaded via `TellingUploadCore.uploadPrepared` (Start flow). (`app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\net\StartTellingApi.kt`) - During telling: `TellingSpeciesManager.collectFinalAsRecord` creates `ServerTellingDataItem` records, `TellingScherm` keeps them in `pendingRecords` and delegates `HybridTellingRepository.saveWaarnemingToRoom(...)` to persist a shadow copy in Room. - Finalize (Afronden): `TellingAfrondHandler.handleAfronden` reads `telling_headers` + `waarnemingen` from Room, runs `RoomMappers.toServerEnvelope()` and posts final `counts_save` via `TellingUploadCore`.
Referenties (belangrijkste bestanden en locaties) - `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\net\TrektellenApi.kt` — API client, endpoints (postCountsSave, postDataSaveSingle) - `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\net\Types.kt` — Server DTOs (ServerTellingEnvelope, ServerTellingDataItem) - `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\features\metadata\helpers\MetadataFormManager.kt` — leest metadata UI velden - `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\features\telling\TellingSpeciesManager.kt` — bouwt waarneming records - `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\features\telling\TellingAnnotationHandler.kt` — past annotaties toe op records - `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\core\database\entities\TellingHeader.kt` — Room header entity - `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\core\database\entities\Waarneming.kt` — Room waarneming entity - `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\core\database\RoomMappers.kt` — Room → Server mapping - `app\src\main\res\layout\scherm_metadata.xml` — widget ids en layouts (metadata) - `app\src\main\res\layout\activity_annotatie.xml` — widget ids and annotation controls - `app\src\main\res\layout\dialog_number_input_dual.xml` — manual number dialog controls
Als je wilt, kan ik: - extra rijen toevoegen met alle overige (minder gebruikte) velden uit `TellingHeader` en `Waarneming` (nu staan de belangrijkste en direct gekoppelde velden in de grid). - hetzelfde document als CSV export genereren zodat je het in een spreadsheet kunt bewerken.
Laat me weten of ik nog velden moet detailleren of extra code:regel-referenties moet toevoegen.
-- Server Envelope (ServerTellingEnvelope) — velden, bron & mapping --
De uiteindelijke envelope die naar `POST /api/counts_save` gestuurd wordt is een `ServerTellingEnvelope` (zie `app\\src\\main\\java\\com\\yvesds\\vt5\\net\\Types.kt`). Hieronder staat per veld waar de waarde vandaan komt (UI scherm of Room), in welke Room-kolom deze wordt opgeslagen (indien van toepassing) en de relevante code-referenties.

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# API-Documentatie — VoiceTally JSON upload, UI → Room → JSON mappings
Doel: beschrijf de JSON-upload routes, alle gebruikersinvoervelden (MetadataScherm, TellingScherm, AnnotatieScherm), de Room-tabellen en maak een verbindende grid die UI veld → Room kolom → JSON veld koppelt. Rechts staan drie lege kolommen voor jouw notities.
Checklist - [x] Endpoint(s) en auth omschrijven - [x] UI-velden inventariseren (Metadata, Telling, Annotatie) - [x] Room-entiteiten en kolommen opnemen (types, PK/FK, indices) - [x] Grid (rijen) die UI widget → form variable → Room kolom → JSON DTO veld linkt - [x] Bestandsreferenties (absolute path + relevante regels)
Belangrijke endpoints
- POST /api/counts_save?language={lang}&versie={versie} - Body: JSON array met precies 1 ServerTellingEnvelope - Auth: HTTP Basic (username/password) - Code: `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\net\TrektellenApi.kt` (postCountsSave, lijnen ~39-81)
- POST /api/data_save/{onlineId} - Body: JSON array met precies 1 ServerTellingDataItem (per-record upload) - Auth: HTTP Basic - Code: `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\net\TrektellenApi.kt` (postDataSaveSingle, lijnen ~90-126)
Opmerking: beide DTOs gebruiken alleen strings voor velden — zie `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\net\Types.kt`.
Room-schema (samenvatting)
- Entity: `telling_headers` (file: `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\core\database\entities\TellingHeader.kt`) - Primary key: `tellingid` (String) - Fields (String): onlineid, externid, timezoneid, bron, telpostid, begintijd, eindtijd, tellers, weer, windrichting, windkracht, temperatuur, bewolking, bewolkinghoogte, neerslag, duurneerslag, zicht, tellersactief, tellersaanwezig, typetelling, metersnet, geluid, opmerkingen, hydro, hpa, equipment, uuid, uploadtijdstip, nrec, nsoort, status - Indices: windrichting, begintijd
- Entity: `waarnemingen` (file: `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\core\database\entities\Waarneming.kt`) - Primary key: composite `(idLocal, tellingid)` (Strings) - Foreign key: tellingid -> telling_headers.tellingid (ON DELETE CASCADE) - Fields (String): soortid, aantal, richting, aantalterug, richtingterug, sightingdirection, lokaal, aantal_plus, aantalterug_plus, lokaal_plus, markeren, markerenlokaal, geslacht, leeftijd, kleed, opmerkingen, trektype, teltype, location, height, tijdstip, groupid, uploadtijdstip, totaalaantal, onlineid - Indices: tellingid, soortid
- Entity: `sync_logs` (file: `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\core\database\entities\SyncLog.kt`) - Fields: id (auto), tellingid, onlineid, timestamp, requestPayload, serverResponse, success
Room-tabel veld-instellingen (detail)
Hieronder staan per Room-tabel de exacte veldinstellingen (SQL-type, Kotlin-type, default value, PK/FK, indices, beschrijving en code reference). Alle velden in de twee hoofd-entities zijn Kotlin non-nullable Strings en worden in Room als TEXT opgeslagen.
`telling_headers` (file: `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\core\database\entities\TellingHeader.kt`, entity lines ~15-48)
| Veld | SQL type | Kotlin type | Default | Primary Key? | Nullable? | FK? | Index? | Beschrijving | Code reference | Veldnaam in 'headerdata' .CSV| Veldnaam in 'data' .CSV |Veldnaam in tellingEnveloppe | Veldnaam in datarecordenveloppe | |---|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---|---|---|---| | tellingid | TEXT | String | (geen default) | Yes | No | - | - | Timestamp van upload (set tijdens prepare/upload) | `TellingHeader.kt` (44) | | | | | | nrec | TEXT | String | "0" | No | No | - | - | Aantal records (nrec) als string | `TellingHeader.kt` (45) | | | | | | nsoort | TEXT | String | "0" | No | No | - `waarnemingen` (file: `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\core\database\entities\Waarneming.kt`, entity lines ~27-54)

Additional notes & mappings
- Room → Server mapping functions: `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\core\database\RoomMappers.kt` contains `TellingHeader.toServerEnvelope(records)` and `Waarneming.toServerItem()` that map Room entity fields to `ServerTellingEnvelope` and `ServerTellingDataItem` fields respectively (see file lines ~1-79).
- Upload lifecycle (where mappings are used): - Start telling: `StartTellingApi.buildEnvelopeFromUi(...)` builds initial `ServerTellingEnvelope` from Metadata UI and is uploaded via `TellingUploadCore.uploadPrepared` (Start flow). (`app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\net\StartTellingApi.kt`) - During telling: `TellingSpeciesManager.collectFinalAsRecord` creates `ServerTellingDataItem` records, `TellingScherm` keeps them in `pendingRecords` and delegates `HybridTellingRepository.saveWaarnemingToRoom(...)` to persist a shadow copy in Room. - Finalize (Afronden): `TellingAfrondHandler.handleAfronden` reads `telling_headers` + `waarnemingen` from Room, runs `RoomMappers.toServerEnvelope()` and posts final `counts_save` via `TellingUploadCore`.
Referenties (belangrijkste bestanden en locaties) - `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\net\TrektellenApi.kt` — API client, endpoints (postCountsSave, postDataSaveSingle) - `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\net\Types.kt` — Server DTOs (ServerTellingEnvelope, ServerTellingDataItem) - `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\features\metadata\helpers\MetadataFormManager.kt` — leest metadata UI velden - `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\features\telling\TellingSpeciesManager.kt` — bouwt waarneming records - `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\features\telling\TellingAnnotationHandler.kt` — past annotaties toe op records - `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\core\database\entities\TellingHeader.kt` — Room header entity - `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\core\database\entities\Waarneming.kt` — Room waarneming entity - `app\src\main\java\com\yvesds\vt5\core\database\RoomMappers.kt` — Room → Server mapping - `app\src\main\res\layout\scherm_metadata.xml` — widget ids en layouts (metadata) - `app\src\main\res\layout\activity_annotatie.xml` — widget ids and annotation controls - `app\src\main\res\layout\dialog_number_input_dual.xml` — manual number dialog controls
Als je wilt, kan ik: - extra rijen toevoegen met alle overige (minder gebruikte) velden uit `TellingHeader` en `Waarneming` (nu staan de belangrijkste en direct gekoppelde velden in de grid). - hetzelfde document als CSV export genereren zodat je het in een spreadsheet kunt bewerken.
Laat me weten of ik nog velden moet detailleren of extra code:regel-referenties moet toevoegen.

Referenties: - `app\\src\\main\\java\\com\\yvesds\\vt5\\net\\StartTellingApi.kt` — `buildEnvelopeFromUi` (16-84) - `app\\src\\main\\java\\com\\yvesds\\vt5\\features\\telling\\TellingUploadCore.kt` — `prepareEnvelopeForUpload` (114-135) en upload handling (181-276) - `app\\src\\main\\java\\com\\yvesds\\vt5\\core\\database\\RoomMappers.kt` — header -> ServerTellingEnvelope mapping (11-46) en waarneming -> ServerTellingDataItem mapping (49-77)

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="8dp" android:layout_marginVertical="4dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/vt5_dark_gray" app:cardCornerRadius="8dp" app:strokeColor="@color/vt5_light_blue" app:strokeWidth="1dp" app:cardElevation="2dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<CheckBox android:id="@+id/cbSelect" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:buttonTint="@color/vt5_light_blue" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTellingId" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/vt5_on_surface" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingHorizontal="8dp" android:paddingVertical="2dp" android:background="@color/vt5_light_blue" android:textColor="@color/vt5_white" android:textSize="11sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvStats" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:textColor="@color/vt5_light_blue" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvOnlineId" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:textColor="@color/vt5_light_gray" android:textSize="14sp" />
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginVertical="8dp" android:alpha="0.2" android:background="@color/vt5_on_surface" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTijd" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:textColor="@color/vt5_on_surface" android:textSize="13sp" />
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/vt5_dark_gray" app:cardCornerRadius="8dp" app:strokeColor="@color/vt5_light_blue" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDirectionHeader" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/popup_bg_wit" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<CheckBox android:id="@+id/cbShowTrek" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Trek" android:textColor="@color/popup_bg_wit" android:checked="true" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingEnd="0dp" />
<CheckBox android:id="@+id/cbShowReturn" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Terug" android:textColor="@color/popup_bg_wit" android:checked="true" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingEnd="0dp" />
</LinearLayout>
<com.patrykandpatrick.vico.views.cartesian.CartesianChartView android:id="@+id/chartDirection" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="210dp" android:padding="4dp" /> </LinearLayout>
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>

<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDirectionHeader" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:textColor="@color/popup_bg_wit" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" />

option.value: /scherm_db_soort_overzicht (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:paddingTop="30dp" android:paddingBottom="40dp" android:background="@color/vt5_black" android:orientation="vertical">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="10dp">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnTerug" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:minWidth="48dp" android:text="@string/instellingen_back_arrow" android:textSize="18sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:text="Overzicht" android:textColor="@color/vt5_on_surface" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:alpha="0.3" android:background="@color/vt5_on_surface" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="10dp">
<AutoCompleteTextView android:id="@+id/atvSoortZoeken" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:backgroundTint="@color/vt5_on_surface" android:hint="@string/db_beheer_hint_soortnaam" android:textColor="@color/vt5_on_surface" android:textColorHint="@color/vt5_on_surface" />
<!-- Year selector dropdown: first item will be 'Alle jaren' --> <Spinner android:id="@+id/spinnerYears" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:spinnerMode="dropdown" android:popupBackground="@color/vt5_black" android:prompt="@string/prompt_year" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSoortInfo" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:textColor="@color/vt5_on_surface" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="italic" />
<!-- In-layout progress indicator for overview loading --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/pbOverviewContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:visibility="gone" android:layout_marginTop="8dp">
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/pbOverviewLoading" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleLarge" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:indeterminate="true" />
</LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.tabs.TabLayout android:id="@+id/tabSoortOverzicht" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:tabMode="fixed" app:tabGravity="fill" app:tabIndicatorColor="@color/vt5_light_blue" app:tabSelectedTextColor="@color/vt5_light_blue" app:tabTextColor="@color/vt5_on_surface">
<com.google.android.material.tabs.TabItem android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Overzicht" />
<com.google.android.material.tabs.TabItem android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Grafieken" /> </com.google.android.material.tabs.TabLayout>
<androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/contentOverview" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvWaarnemingen" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:padding="10dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutGrafieken" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="10dp" android:visibility="gone">
<GridLayout android:id="@+id/gridWindCharts" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:alignmentMode="alignMargins" android:columnCount="1" android:orientation="horizontal" android:useDefaultMargins="false" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>
</LinearLayout>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:paddingTop="30dp" android:paddingBottom="40dp" android:background="@color/vt5_black" android:orientation="vertical">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="10dp">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnTerug" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:minWidth="48dp" android:text="@string/instellingen_back_arrow" android:textSize="18sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:text="Overzicht" android:textColor="@color/vt5_on_surface" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:alpha="0.3" android:background="@color/vt5_on_surface" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="10dp">
<AutoCompleteTextView android:id="@+id/atvSoortZoeken" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:backgroundTint="@color/vt5_on_surface" android:hint="@string/db_beheer_hint_soortnaam" android:textColor="@color/vt5_on_surface" android:textColorHint="@color/vt5_on_surface" />
<!-- Year selector dropdown: first item will be 'Alle jaren' --> <Spinner android:id="@+id/spinnerYears" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:spinnerMode="dropdown" android:popupBackground="@color/vt5_black" android:prompt="@string/prompt_year" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSoortInfo" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:textColor="@color/vt5_on_surface" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="italic" />
<!-- In-layout progress indicator for overview loading --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/pbOverviewContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:visibility="gone" android:layout_marginTop="8dp">
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/pbOverviewLoading" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleLarge" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:indeterminate="true" />
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/pbOverviewProgress" style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:indeterminate="false" android:visibility="gone" android:max="100" />
</LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.tabs.TabLayout android:id="@+id/tabSoortOverzicht" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:tabMode="fixed" app:tabGravity="fill" app:tabIndicatorColor="@color/vt5_light_blue" app:tabSelectedTextColor="@color/vt5_light_blue" app:tabTextColor="@color/vt5_on_surface">
<com.google.android.material.tabs.TabItem android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Overzicht" />
<com.google.android.material.tabs.TabItem android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Grafieken" /> </com.google.android.material.tabs.TabLayout>
<androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/contentOverview" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvWaarnemingen" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:padding="10dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutGrafieken" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="10dp" android:visibility="gone">
<GridLayout android:id="@+id/gridWindCharts" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:alignmentMode="alignMargins" android:columnCount="1" android:orientation="horizontal" android:useDefaultMargins="false" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /scherm_hoofd (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/root" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/vt5_black" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingLeft="20dp" android:paddingRight="20dp" android:paddingTop="50dp" android:paddingBottom="60dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTitel" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/titel_hoofd" android:textColor="@color/vt5_on_surface" android:textSize="22sp" android:paddingBottom="16dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnInstall" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:text="@string/titel_install" android:textSize="16sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnVerder" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:text="@string/btn_verder_metadata" android:textSize="16sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnJoinAsClient" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:text="@string/mc_btn_join_as_client" android:textSize="16sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnAfsluiten" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/btn_afsluiten" android:textSize="16sp" />
<!-- Alarm sectie --> <View android:id="@+id/divider_alarm" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:background="@color/vt5_on_surface" android:alpha="0.3" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAlarmStatus" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="" android:textColor="@color/vt5_on_surface" android:textSize="14sp" android:paddingBottom="12dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnToggleAlarm" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/hoofd_alarm_toggle" android:textSize="14sp" />
<!-- Telling Beheer sectie --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnBewerkTellingen" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/hoofd_bewerk_tellingen" android:textSize="14sp" />
<!-- Exports opkuis sectie --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnOpkuisExports" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/hoofd_opkuis_exports" android:textSize="14sp" />
<!-- Instellingen sectie --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnInstellingen" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/hoofd_instellingen" android:textSize="14sp" />
<!-- Database Beheer sectie --> <!-- AI model update knop --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnAiUpdate" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="AI-model updaten" android:textSize="14sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnDatabaseBeheer" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/hoofd_database_beheer" android:textSize="14sp" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/root" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/vt5_black" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingLeft="20dp" android:paddingRight="20dp" android:paddingTop="50dp" android:paddingBottom="60dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTitel" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/titel_hoofd" android:textColor="@color/vt5_on_surface" android:textSize="22sp" android:paddingBottom="16dp" />

<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnVerder" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:text="@string/btn_verder_metadata" android:textSize="16sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnJoinAsClient" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:text="@string/mc_btn_join_as_client" android:textSize="16sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnAfsluiten" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/btn_afsluiten" android:textSize="16sp" />
<!-- Alarm sectie --> <View android:id="@+id/divider_alarm" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:background="@color/vt5_on_surface" android:alpha="0.3" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvAlarmStatus" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="" android:textColor="@color/vt5_on_surface" android:textSize="14sp" android:paddingBottom="12dp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnToggleAlarm" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/hoofd_alarm_toggle" android:textSize="14sp" />
<!-- Telling Beheer sectie --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnBewerkTellingen" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/hoofd_bewerk_tellingen" android:textSize="14sp" />
<!-- Exports opkuis sectie --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnOpkuisExports" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/hoofd_opkuis_exports" android:textSize="14sp" />
<!-- Instellingen sectie --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnInstellingen" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/hoofd_instellingen" android:textSize="14sp" />
<!-- Database Beheer sectie --> <!-- AI model update knop --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnAiUpdate" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="AI-model updaten" android:textSize="14sp" />
<!-- Exporteer training CSV voor lokale modelbouw --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnExportCsv" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="Exporteer training CSV" android:textSize="14sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnDatabaseBeheer" style="@style/Widget.VT5.Button.Outlined" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/hoofd_database_beheer" android:textSize="14sp" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /strings (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <string name="app_name">VT5</string>
<!-- Annotatie density toggle content descriptions --> <string name="annotatie_density_standard">Standaard weergave</string> <string name="annotatie_density_compact">Compacte weergave</string> <string name="annotatie_density_supercompact">Supercompacte weergave</string>
<!-- Hoofdscherm --> <string name="titel_hoofd">VoiceTally - spraakinvoer</string> <string name="btn_install_start">((Her)Installatie starten</string> <string name="btn_verder_metadata">Invullen telpostgegevens</string> <string name="btn_afsluiten">Afsluiten</string>
<!-- Installatie --> <string name="titel_install">(Her)Installatie</string> <string name="install_uitleg"> Deze toepassing moet bestanden kunnen inlezen en wegschrijven. Bevestig het gebruik van de map ‘Documents’ in de volgende stap (kies ‘Deze map gebruiken’). Alle mappen/bestanden worden aangemaakt indien nodig. Bij herinstallatie wordt niets overschreven. </string> <string name="install_permissions_title">Toestemmingen en uitleg</string> <string name="perm_audio_checkbox">Microfoon (spraakherkenning) - nodig om soorten via spraak in te geven.</string> <string name="perm_saf_checkbox">Bestanden in Documents (SAF) - nodig om tellingen en serverdata op te slaan.</string> <string name="perm_location_checkbox">Locatie (weer Auto) - nodig om weergegevens automatisch op te halen.</string> <string name="install_unknown_sources_title">Installatiehulp</string> <string name="install_unknown_sources_desc">Als het toestel installatie van onbekende apps blokkeert, open de instellingen en sta installatie toe voor de gebruikte install-app (bv. Bestanden of je browser).</string> <string name="install_unknown_sources_button">Open installatie-instellingen</string>
<string name="btn_kies_documents">Map ‘Documents’ kiezen</string> <string name="btn_check_folders">Submappen controleren/aanmaken</string> <string name="status_saf_niet_ingesteld">SAF niet ingesteld.\nKies ‘Documents’ en bevestig ‘Deze map gebruiken’.</string> <string name="status_saf_ok">SAF ingesteld ✔ — alle VT5-submappen aanwezig.</string> <string name="status_saf_missing">SAF ingesteld, maar submappen ontbreken nog.\nDruk op ‘Submappen controleren/aanmaken’.</string>
<string name="sect_trektellen">Trektellen-gegevens</string> <string name="hint_login">Loginnaam</string> <string name="hint_password">Paswoord</string> <string name="btn_wis">Wis</string> <string name="btn_bewaar">Bewaar</string>
<string name="btn_login_test">Login test</string> <string name="msg_vul_login_eerst">Vul eerst login en paswoord in.</string> <string name="msg_credentials_gewist">Credentials gewist</string> <string name="msg_credentials_opgeslagen">Credentials opgeslagen</string> <string name="dlg_titel_result">Resultaat</string> <string name="dlg_ok">OK</string> <string name="dlg_cancel">Annuleren</string> <string name="dlg_disable_next">Pop-ups uitzetten (alleen voor login-check)</string>
<string name="btn_download_jsons">Serverdata ophalen</string> <string name="msg_kies_documents_eerst">Kies eerst ‘Documents’ en maak submappen.</string>
<string name="btn_alias_precompute">Pré-compute aliassen</string> <string name="dlg_busy_titel">Bezig…</string>
<!-- Annotatie strings --> <string name="annotatie_titel">Details waarneming</string> <string name="annotatie_ok">OK</string> <string name="annotatie_annuleren">Annuleren</string>
<string name="msg_loading_annotations">Annotaties laden…</string> <string name="annotatie_none">(geen opties)</string> <string name="annotatie_opmerkingen_label">Opmerkingen</string> <string name="annotatie_opmerkingen_hint">Vrije tekst (optioneel)</string>
<string name="btn_klaar">Klaar</string>
<!-- InstallatieScherm status messages --> <string name="status_alias_rebuild_complete">Alias index rebuild voltooid</string> <string name="status_alias_rebuild_error">Fout bij rebuild: %1$s</string>
<!-- MetadataScherm strings --> <string name="metadata_loading">Metadata laden…</string> <string name="metadata_preparing">Bezig met voorbereiden...</string> <string name="metadata_error_no_telpost">Kies eerst een telpost.</string> <string name="metadata_error_no_credentials">Geen user (check login).</string> <string name="metadata_error_location_denied">Locatierechten geweigerd.</string> <string name="metadata_error_loading_data">Fout bij laden essentiële gegevens</string> <string name="metadata_error_no_location">Geen locatie beschikbaar.</string> <string name="metadata_error_weather_fetch">Kon weer niet ophalen.</string> <string name="metadata_error_weather_fetch_short">Kon weer niet ophalen</string> <string name="metadata_error_start_failed_title">Start telling mislukt</string> <string name="metadata_error_start_failed_msg">Kon telling niet starten:\n%1$s</string> <string name="metadata_error_unclear_title">Start telling onduidelijk</string> <string name="metadata_error_unclear_msg">Server antwoordde, maar kon geen onlineId herkennen.\n\nResponse:\n%1$s</string> <string name="metadata_success_started">Telling gestart (onlineId: %1$s)</string> <string name="metadata_error_preparing">Fout bij voorbereiden telling: %1$s</string> <string name="metadata_dialog_time_title">Tijd kiezen</string> <string name="metadata_cloudcover_format">%1$d/8</string>
<!-- HoofdActiviteit --> <string name="hoofd_metadata_loading">Metadata laden…</string> <string name="hoofd_alarm_enabled">Uurlijks alarm is ingeschakeld</string> <string name="hoofd_alarm_disabled">Uurlijks alarm is uitgeschakeld</string> <string name="hoofd_alarm_test">Test Alarm</string> <string name="hoofd_alarm_toggle">Toggle Alarm</string> <string name="hoofd_bewerk_tellingen">Bewerk tellingen</string> <string name="hoofd_opkuis_exports">Opkuis submap \'exports\'</string> <string name="hoofd_opkuis_bevestig_titel">Exports opkuisen?</string> <string name="hoofd_opkuis_bevestig_msg">Wil je alle bestanden verwijderen behalve de 10 meest recente?\n\n%1$d bestanden zullen verwijderd worden.</string> <string name="hoofd_opkuis_ja">Ja</string> <string name="hoofd_opkuis_nee">Nee</string> <string name="hoofd_opkuis_succes">%1$d bestanden verwijderd</string> <string name="hoofd_opkuis_geen_bestanden">Geen oude bestanden om te verwijderen</string> <string name="hoofd_opkuis_fout">Fout bij opkuisen: %1$s</string> <string name="hoofd_opkuis_laden">Exports laden…</string> <string name="hoofd_instellingen">Instellingen</string> <string name="hoofd_database_beheer">Database Beheer (+ analyse)</string>
<!-- Database Beheer Scherm --> <string name="db_beheer_titel">Database Beheer (+ analyse)</string> <string name="db_beheer_tabel_naam">Tabel: %1$s</string> <string name="db_beheer_records_count">Records: %1$d</string> <string name="db_beheer_wissen_records">Records Wissen</string> <string name="db_beheer_wissen_tabel">Tabel Wissen (Drop)</string> <string name="db_beheer_confirm_titel">Bevestig actie</string> <string name="db_beheer_confirm_records_msg">Weet je zeker dat je alle records uit tabel %1$s wilt wissen? Dit kan NIET ongedaan worden gemaakt.</string> <string name="db_beheer_confirm_tabel_msg">Weet je zeker dat je de tabel %1$s volledig wilt verwijderen en opnieuw aanmaken? Dit kan NIET ongedaan worden gemaakt en kan de app-stabiliteit beïnvloeden.</string> <string name="db_beheer_actie_gelukt">Actie succesvol uitgevoerd</string> <string name="db_beheer_actie_fout">Fout bij uitvoeren actie: %1$s</string> <string name="db_beheer_log_records_gewist">GEBRUIKER: Alle records gewist uit tabel %1$s</string> <string name="db_beheer_log_tabel_dropped">GEBRUIKER: Tabel %1$s is gedropt en opnieuw aangemaakt</string> <string name="db_beheer_btn_sessies">Sessies (Telling Headers)</string> <string name="db_beheer_btn_soort_zoeken">Zoek op Soortnaam</string> <string name="db_beheer_sessie_overzicht">Sessie Overzicht</string> <string name="db_beheer_telling_details">Telling Details</string> <string name="db_beheer_metadata">Metadata</string> <string name="db_beheer_gekoppelde_records">Gekoppelde Records</string> <string name="db_beheer_record_bewerken">Record Bewerken</string> <string name="db_beheer_hint_soortnaam">Type soortnaam...</string> <string name="db_beheer_opslaan">Opslaan</string> <string name="db_beheer_totaal_info">Totaal: %1$d exemplaren in %2$d waarnemingen.</string>
<!-- InstellingenScherm --> <string name="instellingen_titel">Instellingen</string> <string name="instellingen_lettergrootte_partials_label">Lettergrootte partials:</string> <string name="instellingen_lettergrootte_finals_label">Lettergrootte finals:</string> <string name="instellingen_lettergrootte_tegels_label">Lettergrootte tegels (soortnaam + aantallen):</string> <string name="instellingen_sp_eenheid">sp</string> <string name="instellingen_colors_title">Kleuren</string> <string name="instellingen_bg_color_label">Achtergrondkleur</string> <string name="instellingen_text_color_label">Tekstkleur</string> <string name="instellingen_partials_text_color_label">Tekstkleur partials</string> <string name="instellingen_unmatched_partials_text_color_label">Tekstkleur niet-herkende partials</string> <string name="instellingen_finals_text_color_label">Tekstkleur finals</string> <string name="instellingen_log_text_color_label">Tekstkleur logregels</string> <string name="instellingen_back_arrow">←</string> <string name="instellingen_permissions_title">Toestemmingen (info)</string> <string name="instellingen_double_tap_title">Double-tap verhoging op soorttegel</string> <string name="instellingen_double_tap_5">+5</string> <string name="instellingen_double_tap_10">+10</string> <string name="instellingen_double_tap_50">+50</string> <string name="instellingen_double_tap_100">+100</string> <string name="instellingen_pending_tiles_title">Tijdspanne pending tegelinvoer</string> <string name="instellingen_pending_tiles_subtitle">Bundel snelle tegeltaps gedurende deze tijd voordat de waarneming definitief gemaakt en doorgestuurd wordt.</string> <string name="instellingen_dynamic_tile_sorting_title">Dynamische soorttegel-sortering</string> <string name="instellingen_dynamic_tile_sorting_checkbox">Tegels automatisch naar boven verplaatsen</string> <string name="instellingen_dynamic_tile_sorting_description">Sorteert soorttegels volgens het aantal afzonderlijke waarnemingen van vandaag. Uitgevinkt blijft de volgorde alfabetisch.</string> <string name="instellingen_server_response_logging_title">Serverresponses loggen</string> <string name="instellingen_server_response_logging_checkbox">Pretty-print JSON antwoord van counts_save bewaren</string> <string name="instellingen_server_response_logging_description">Bewaart elke serverreturn van counts_save als JSON-bestand in VT5/logs. Handig voor controle of foutopsporing, maar kan extra opslagruimte gebruiken.</string> <string name="instellingen_pending_tiles_2">2 s</string> <string name="instellingen_pending_tiles_3">3 s</string> <string name="instellingen_pending_tiles_5">5 s</string> <string name="instellingen_pending_tiles_8">8 s</string> <string name="instellingen_pending_tiles_10">10 s</string> <string name="instellingen_pending_tiles_12">12 s</string> <string name="instellingen_pending_tiles_15">15 s</string> <string name="finals_log_uploaded_icon">↑</string> <string name="finals_log_uploaded_content_description">Waarneming reeds naar server verzonden</string>
<!-- InstellingenScherm: favorieten/recents --> <string name="instellingen_fav_limit_title">Instellen aantal recente soorten</string> <string name="instellingen_fav_15">15</string> <string name="instellingen_fav_20">20</string> <string name="instellingen_fav_25">25</string> <string name="instellingen_fav_30">30</string> <string name="instellingen_fav_35">35</string> <string name="instellingen_fav_40">40</string> <string name="instellingen_fav_75">75</string> <string name="instellingen_fav_all">ALLE</string>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <string name="app_name">VT5</string>
<!-- Annotatie density toggle content descriptions --> <string name="annotatie_density_standard">Standaard weergave</string> <string name="annotatie_density_compact">Compacte weergave</string> <string name="annotatie_density_supercompact">Supercompacte weergave</string>
<!-- Hoofdscherm --> <string name="titel_hoofd">VoiceTally - spraakinvoer</string> <string name="btn_install_start">((Her)Installatie starten</string> <string name="btn_verder_metadata">Invullen telpostgegevens</string> <string name="btn_afsluiten">Afsluiten</string>
<!-- Installatie --> <string name="titel_install">(Her)Installatie</string> <string name="install_uitleg"> Deze toepassing moet bestanden kunnen inlezen en wegschrijven. Bevestig het gebruik van de map ‘Documents’ in de volgende stap (kies ‘Deze map gebruiken’). Alle mappen/bestanden worden aangemaakt indien nodig. Bij herinstallatie wordt niets overschreven. </string> <string name="install_permissions_title">Toestemmingen en uitleg</string> <string name="perm_audio_checkbox">Microfoon (spraakherkenning) - nodig om soorten via spraak in te geven.</string> <string name="perm_saf_checkbox">Bestanden in Documents (SAF) - nodig om tellingen en serverdata op te slaan.</string> <string name="perm_location_checkbox">Locatie (weer Auto) - nodig om weergegevens automatisch op te halen.</string> <string name="install_unknown_sources_title">Installatiehulp</string> <string name="install_unknown_sources_desc">Als het toestel installatie van onbekende apps blokkeert, open de instellingen en sta installatie toe voor de gebruikte install-app (bv. Bestanden of je browser).</string> <string name="install_unknown_sources_button">Open installatie-instellingen</string>
<string name="btn_kies_documents">Map ‘Documents’ kiezen</string> <string name="btn_check_folders">Submappen controleren/aanmaken</string> <string name="status_saf_niet_ingesteld">SAF niet ingesteld.\nKies ‘Documents’ en bevestig ‘Deze map gebruiken’.</string> <string name="status_saf_ok">SAF ingesteld ✔ — alle VT5-submappen aanwezig.</string> <string name="status_saf_missing">SAF ingesteld, maar submappen ontbreken nog.\nDruk op ‘Submappen controleren/aanmaken’.</string>

Manuele invoer blijft wel mogelijk.</string> <string name="perm_disable_message_saf">Zonder toegang tot Documents kan de app geen tellingen opslaan of bestanden lezen/schrijven.</string> <string name="perm_disable_message_location">Zonder locatie kan de knop "Auto" geen weergegevens ophalen.</string> <string name="prompt_year">Jaar</string> </resources>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /train_model (snapshot).py

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
#!/usr/bin/env python3 """ Train a small Keras model from the exported CSV and convert it to a TFLite file.
Usage examples: python tools/train_model.py --csv /path/to/training_export.csv --out model.tflite python tools/train_model.py --csv data.csv --out model.tflite --quantize dynamic --epochs 20
This script: - Loads the CSV produced by the app - Selects a sensible numeric feature set, fills missing values - Encodes species labels and saves a mapping JSON next to the output .tflite - Trains a small dense network with early stopping - Converts the best model to TFLite with optional quantization
Notes: - For real production models more feature engineering and model validation is required. """ import argparse import json import os import tempfile
import numpy as np import pandas as pd from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split from sklearn.preprocessing import LabelEncoder
# TensorFlow is optional: try to import, otherwise fall back to scikit-learn try: import tensorflow as tf TF_AVAILABLE = True except Exception: tf = None TF_AVAILABLE = False from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier import joblib
def load_csv(path): df = pd.read_csv(path) return df
def choose_feature_columns(df: pd.DataFrame): # Prefer engineered numeric columns from the exporter; fall back to heuristics preferred = [ 'temp_numeric', 'wind_ms_numeric', 'wind_dir_sin', 'wind_dir_cos', 'cloud_pct', 'visibility', 'precip', 'ref_avg_wind_ms', 'ref_avg_pressure', 'day_sin', 'day_cos', 'hour_sin', 'hour_cos', 'label_count' ] cols = [c for c in preferred if c in df.columns] if not cols: # take all numeric columns except known meta columns skip = {'tellingid', 'epoch', 'siteid', 'label_species_id', 'sample_weight'} cols = [c for c, t in df.dtypes.items() if np.issubdtype(t, np.number) and c not in skip] return cols
def build_model(input_dim, num_classes): if not TF_AVAILABLE: raise RuntimeError('TensorFlow is not available in this environment') model = tf.keras.Sequential([ tf.keras.layers.Input(shape=(input_dim,)), tf.keras.layers.Dense(128, activation='relu'), tf.keras.layers.Dropout(0.3), tf.keras.layers.Dense(64, activation='relu'), tf.keras.layers.Dropout(0.2), tf.keras.layers.Dense(num_classes, activation='softmax') ]) model.compile(optimizer='adam', loss='sparse_categorical_crossentropy', metrics=['accuracy']) return model
def convert_to_tflite(saved_model_dir: str, out_path: str, quantize: str = 'none'): if not TF_AVAILABLE: raise RuntimeError('TensorFlow not available for TFLite conversion') converter = tf.lite.TFLiteConverter.from_saved_model(saved_model_dir) if quantize == 'dynamic': converter.optimizations = [tf.lite.Optimize.DEFAULT] elif quantize == 'float16': converter.optimizations = [tf.lite.Optimize.DEFAULT] converter.target_spec.supported_types = [tf.float16] # else: no quantization tflite_model = converter.convert() with open(out_path, 'wb') as f: f.write(tflite_model)
def train_with_sklearn(X_train, y_train, X_val, y_val, sample_weight, out_path): # Train a RandomForest classifier as a fallback when TF isn't installed clf = RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=200, max_depth=12, random_state=42, n_jobs=-1) if sample_weight is not None: clf.fit(X_train, y_train, sample_weight=sample_weight) else: clf.fit(X_train, y_train) acc = clf.score(X_val, y_val) print(f'Sklearn validation accuracy: {acc:.4f}') joblib.dump(clf, out_path) print('Wrote sklearn model to', out_path)
def main(): parser = argparse.ArgumentParser() parser.add_argument('--csv', required=True, help='Path to exported training CSV') parser.add_argument('--out', required=True, help='Output .tflite path') parser.add_argument('--epochs', type=int, default=25) parser.add_argument('--batch-size', type=int, default=128) parser.add_argument('--val-split', type=float, default=0.15) parser.add_argument('--quantize', choices=['none', 'dynamic', 'float16'], default='dynamic') parser.add_argument('--seed', type=int, default=42) args = parser.parse_args()
df = load_csv(args.csv) print('Loaded', len(df), 'rows. Columns:', list(df.columns))
feature_cols = choose_feature_columns(df) if not feature_cols: raise SystemExit('No feature columns found in CSV. Check the header and exporter.') print('Using features:', feature_cols)
X = df[feature_cols].copy() # Fill missing numeric values with column mean for c in X.columns: if X[c].isnull().any(): mean = X[c].mean() X[c] = X[c].fillna(mean)
X = X.astype(float).values
# Labels le = LabelEncoder() y = le.fit_transform(df['label_species_id'].astype(str).values) num_classes = len(le.classes_) print('Found', num_classes, 'unique species')
# Save label mapping next to output out_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(args.out)) or '.' labels_path = os.path.join(out_dir, os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(args.out))[0] + '.labels.json') with open(labels_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: json.dump({'classes': le.classes_.tolist()}, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) print('Wrote label mapping to', labels_path)
# Sample weights if available sample_weight = None if 'sample_weight' in df.columns: sw = df['sample_weight'].fillna(1.0).astype(float).values # Normalize weights to avoid extremely large loss scaling sample_weight = sw / (np.mean(sw) + 1e-9)
# Train/validation split X_train, X_val, y_train, y_val, sw_train, sw_val = train_test_split( X, y, sample_weight if sample_weight is not None else np.zeros(len(y)), test_size=args.val_split, random_state=args.seed, stratify=y )
# Convert sw back to None if it wasn't provided if sample_weight is None: sw_train = None sw_val = None else: # if we passed zeros placeholder, train_test_split returned zeros array; replace with actual split of sample_weight sw_train = sw_train sw_val = sw_val
model = build_model(X_train.shape[1], num_classes)
callbacks = [ tf.keras.callbacks.EarlyStopping(monitor='val_loss', patience=4, restore_best_weights=True) ]
model.fit( X_train, y_train, validation_data=(X_val, y_val) if sw_val is None else (X_val, y_val, sw_val), epochs=args.epochs, batch_size=args.batch_size, sample_weight=sw_train, callbacks=callbacks )
# Save best model to temp dir and convert tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix='vt5_saved_') print('Saving SavedModel to', tmpdir) model.save(tmpdir)
print('Converting to TFLite (quantize=%s)...' % args.quantize) convert_to_tflite(tmpdir, args.out, quantize=args.quantize) print('Wrote', args.out)
if __name__ == '__main__': main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3 """ Train a small Keras model from the exported CSV and convert it to a TFLite file.
Usage examples: python tools/train_model.py --csv /path/to/training_export.csv --out model.tflite python tools/train_model.py --csv data.csv --out model.tflite --quantize dynamic --epochs 20
This script: - Loads the CSV produced by the app - Selects a sensible numeric feature set, fills missing values - Encodes species labels and saves a mapping JSON next to the output .tflite - Trains a small dense network with early stopping - Converts the best model to TFLite with optional quantization
Notes: - For real production models more feature engineering and model validation is required. """ import argparse import json import os import tempfile
import numpy as np import pandas as pd from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split from sklearn.preprocessing import LabelEncoder
# TensorFlow is optional: try to import, otherwise fall back to scikit-learn try: import tensorflow as tf TF_AVAILABLE = True except Exception: tf = None TF_AVAILABLE = False from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier import joblib
def load_csv(path): df = pd.read_csv(path) return df
def choose_feature_columns(df: pd.DataFrame): # Prefer engineered numeric columns from the exporter; fall back to heuristics preferred = [ 'temp_numeric', 'wind_ms_numeric', 'wind_dir_sin', 'wind_dir_cos', 'cloud_pct', 'visibility', 'precip', 'ref_avg_wind_ms', 'ref_avg_pressure', 'day_sin', 'day_cos', 'hour_sin', 'hour_cos', 'label_count' ] cols = [c for c in preferred if c in df.columns] if not cols: # take all numeric columns except known meta columns skip = {'tellingid', 'epoch', 'siteid', 'label_species_id', 'sample_weight'} cols = [c for c, t in df.dtypes.items() if np.issubdtype(t, np.number) and c not in skip] return cols
def build_model(input_dim, num_classes): if not TF_AVAILABLE: raise RuntimeError('TensorFlow is not available in this environment') model = tf.keras.Sequential([ tf.keras.layers.Input(shape=(input_dim,)), tf.keras.layers.Dense(128, activation='relu'), tf.keras.layers.Dropout(0.3), tf.keras.layers.Dense(64, activation='relu'), tf.keras.layers.Dropout(0.2), tf.keras.layers.Dense(num_classes, activation='softmax') ]) model.compile(optimizer='adam', loss='sparse_categorical_crossentropy', metrics=['accuracy']) return model
def convert_to_tflite(saved_model_dir: str, out_path: str, quantize: str = 'none'): if not TF_AVAILABLE: raise RuntimeError('TensorFlow not available for TFLite conversion') converter = tf.lite.TFLiteConverter.from_saved_model(saved_model_dir) if quantize == 'dynamic': converter.optimizations = [tf.lite.Optimize.DEFAULT] elif quantize == 'float16': converter.optimizations = [tf.lite.Optimize.DEFAULT] converter.target_spec.supported_types = [tf.float16] # else: no quantization tflite_model = converter.convert() with open(out_path, 'wb') as f: f.write(tflite_model)
def train_with_sklearn(X_train, y_train, X_val, y_val, sample_weight, out_path): # Train a RandomForest classifier as a fallback when TF isn't installed clf = RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=200, max_depth=12, random_state=42, n_jobs=-1) if sample_weight is not None: clf.fit(X_train, y_train, sample_weight=sample_weight) else: clf.fit(X_train, y_train) acc = clf.score(X_val, y_val) print(f'Sklearn validation accuracy: {acc:.4f}') joblib.dump(clf, out_path) print('Wrote sklearn model to', out_path)
def main(): parser = argparse.ArgumentParser() parser.add_argument('--csv', required=True, help='Path to exported training CSV') parser.add_argument('--out', required=True, help='Output .tflite path') parser.add_argument('--epochs', type=int, default=25) parser.add_argument('--batch-size', type=int, default=128) parser.add_argument('--val-split', type=float, default=0.15) parser.add_argument('--quantize', choices=['none', 'dynamic', 'float16'], default='dynamic') parser.add_argument('--seed', type=int, default=42) args = parser.parse_args()
df = load_csv(args.csv) print('Loaded', len(df), 'rows. Columns:', list(df.columns))
feature_cols = choose_feature_columns(df) if not feature_cols: raise SystemExit('No feature columns found in CSV. Check the header and exporter.') print('Using features:', feature_cols)
X = df[feature_cols].copy() # Fill missing numeric values with column mean for c in X.columns: if X[c].isnull().any(): mean = X[c].mean() X[c] = X[c].fillna(mean)
X = X.astype(float).values
# Labels le = LabelEncoder() y = le.fit_transform(df['label_species_id'].astype(str).values) num_classes = len(le.classes_) print('Found', num_classes, 'unique species')
# Save label mapping next to output out_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(args.out)) or '.' labels_path = os.path.join(out_dir, os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(args.out))[0] + '.labels.json') with open(labels_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: json.dump({'classes': le.classes_.tolist()}, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) print('Wrote label mapping to', labels_path)
# Sample weights if available sample_weight = None if 'sample_weight' in df.columns: sw = df['sample_weight'].fillna(1.0).astype(float).values # Normalize weights to avoid extremely large loss scaling sample_weight = sw / (np.mean(sw) + 1e-9)
# Train/validation split X_train, X_val, y_train, y_val, sw_train, sw_val = train_test_split( X, y, sample_weight if sample_weight is not None else np.zeros(len(y)), test_size=args.val_split, random_state=args.seed, stratify=y )
# Convert sw back to None if it wasn't provided if sample_weight is None: sw_train = None sw_val = None else: # if we passed zeros placeholder, train_test_split returned zeros array; replace with actual split of sample_weight sw_train = sw_train sw_val = sw_val
if TF_AVAILABLE: model = build_model(X_train.shape[1], num_classes)
callbacks = [ tf.keras.callbacks.EarlyStopping(monitor='val_loss', patience=4, restore_best_weights=True) ]
model.fit( X_train, y_train, validation_data=(X_val, y_val) if sw_val is None else (X_val, y_val, sw_val), epochs=args.epochs, batch_size=args.batch_size, sample_weight=sw_train, callbacks=callbacks )
# Save best model to temp dir and convert tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix='vt5_saved_') print('Saving SavedModel to', tmpdir) model.save(tmpdir)
print('Converting to TFLite (quantize=%s)...' % args.quantize) convert_to_tflite(tmpdir, args.out, quantize=args.quantize) print('Wrote', args.out) else: # No TensorFlow available: train a sklearn model and save as joblib out_joblib = os.path.splitext(args.out)[0] + '.joblib' print('TensorFlow not available: training sklearn RandomForest and writing', out_joblib) train_with_sklearn(X_train, y_train, X_val, y_val, sw_train, out_joblib)
if __name__ == '__main__': main()
